nodes.name: Fetch Vercel Project
nodes.notes: Fetch project config including tracking pixels

nodes.name: Fetch Generation
nodes.notes: Fetch the HTML content to deploy

nodes.name: Fetch Existing Live Pages
nodes.notes: Fetch all currently live pages for this project (Vercel replaces entire deployment)

nodes.name: Build Deployment Files
nodes.notes: Inject tracking pixels into HTML and build the files array for Vercel deployment. Includes all existing live pages (Vercel replaces entire project per deploy).

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.project_name, project: $json.vercel_project_id, target: 'production', files: $json.files.map(f => ({ file: f.file, data: Buffer.from(f.data).toString('base64'), encoding: 'base64' })), teamId: $json.team_id || undefined }) }}

nodes.name: Vercel: Deploy Files
nodes.notes: Deploy all pages to Vercel using the Files API. Each deployment replaces the entire project.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, deployment_url: $node['Build Deployed Page Record'].json.deployment_url, deployed_page: $json }) }}
